title: Earth Mobs Mod
description: With over 300,000 downloads, this mod adds a colorful new variety of mobs to discover, and more! This was a high school project of mine I did for college applications
body:
![Downloads of the mod](https://cf.way2muchnoise.eu/full_392290_downloads.svg)
![Mod Discord URL](https://img.shields.io/discord/870058549177372703?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=red)

After a ton of user requests, I'm beginning to slowly migrate my mod over to Modrinth from CurseForge where it's been for years. This was one of my first mods I coded in high school!


![Animals photoshoot](https://i.imgur.com/L1HNaqc.png)

The other mods that added Minecraft Earth were below 1.15.2 at the time and missing many features, so I made a mod that adds the Minecraft Earth features to 1.15.2 and beyond


As of the latest version, we have **diverse mobs, new items, colorful blocks, amazing loot, and a secret dimension**!


Uses (and requires) GeckoLib as an animation engine

You may use this mod in a modpack as long as you do not sell it via any means, you give credit (Linking back to this page), you do not make any changes to the mod aside from config files, and you follow all of the other terms listed in the license.

   


Let's take a look at the mod features! (A full list is on our [wiki](https://github.com/Derec-Mods/derecearthmod/wiki))

 


## Mod Showcase
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/S0YIKBue5q8" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>



 

[Join our modding discord](https://discord.gg/HM5XEe6pW6)!  (dm me about the SMP if interested)



Also if you liked the mod and want to see my progress a simple follow would do!



## ❤️ Credits:  
Coded by DerexXD


[![Awesome users that have helped me out!](https://i.imgur.com/Nkagfgr.png)](https://github.com/Derec-Mods/derecearthmod/wiki/User-Credits)
